questions: Is the lesion small and early stage? (Yes/No)
Is the lesion persistent or large? (Yes/No)
Is the lesion close to the lacrimal punctum? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have recurrent chalazia, particularly if associated with acne rosacea? (Yes/No)
Is the chalazion large, present for more than 3-4 months, or cosmetically unacceptable? (Yes/No)
